heading: Prerequisites
body:
- The [Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current) installed and running v1.14.3 or later.

- [MongoDB Command Line Database Tools](https://fastdl.mongodb.org/tools/db/mongodb-database-tools-macos-arm64-100.10.0.zip)
  installed.

- A [Hugging Face Access Token](https://huggingface.co/docs/hub/en/security-tokens)
  with read access.

- [Git Large File Storage](https://git-lfs.com/) installed.

- A terminal and code editor to run your Node.js project.

- [npm and Node.js](https://docs.npmjs.com/downloading-and-installing-node-js-and-npm)
  installed.
